task_completion.description: Configure Tor to use Germany as the exit node
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the Tor configuration file (torrc) being edited to include the lines 'ExitNodes {de}' and 'StrictNodes 1'.

task_completion.description: Open Tor Browser and navigate to the verification website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser is open with the address bar showing 'check.torproject.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tor connection is successful
task_completion.visual_evidence: The check.torproject.org webpage displays a success message (e.g., 'Congratulations. This browser is configured to use Tor.') along with an IP address.

task_completion.description: Save the verification text to exit_verification.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing a file named 'exit_verification.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/' that contains the success message and IP address copied from check.torproject.org.

task_completion.description: Create the structured Tor exit configuration report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing a file named 'tor_exit_config_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/' containing the fields: Country (de), ExitNodes ({de}), StrictNodes (1), Tor Verified status, and the Exit IP address.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Tor Browser to verify the connection
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Tor Browser GUI being used to visit check.torproject.org, rather than a standard browser or a terminal curl command.

integrity.description: The IP address in the reports matches the actual Tor exit node IP
integrity.visual_evidence: The Exit IP address written in 'tor_exit_config_report.txt' and 'exit_verification.txt' exactly matches the IP address displayed on the check.torproject.org webpage in the browser.

integrity.description: The required files were created in the correct directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the text editor title bars, terminal prompts, or file manager explicitly show '/home/ga/Documents/' for both required text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target country code for Tor ExitNodes is 'de' (Germany). The agent must configure the torrc file with 'ExitNodes {de}' and 'StrictNodes 1'. Exactly two files must be created: '/home/ga/Documents/exit_verification.txt' and '/home/ga/Documents/tor_exit_config_report.txt'.
